challenge.title: Korak 1
challenge.description:
U ovoj radionici, veštaćete se korišćenjem metoda includes() i slice().

Počni, kreiraj parametar nazvan fccSentence i dodeli mu vrednost niza karaktera "freeCodeCamp is a great place to learn web development.".

tests.text: Tvoj parametar za fccSentence mora dobiti vrednost stringa "freeCodeCamp is a great place to learn web development.".
tests.testString: assert.strictEqual(fccSentence, "freeCodeCamp is a great place to learn web development.");

challengeFiles.name: script
